mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id ASC

SELECT u.coach_id, u.school_id, COALESCE(CONCAT(c.first_name, c.last_name), '未加入教练') as coach , COALESCE(s.name, '未加入学校') as school FROM user u LEFT JOIN user c ON u.coach_id = c.id LEFT JOIN school s ON u.school_id = s.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
SELECT u.id, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.first_name_en, u.last_name_en FROM user u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE u.school_id = #{schoolId} AND ur.role_id = '5';
SELECT u.id, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.first_name_en, u.last_name_en FROM user u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE u.school_id = #{schoolId} AND ur.role_id = '6';
